mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.content, c.create_time, u.id AS user_id, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
